title: Zervan LeafcutterAnt Admission Declaration Schema (v1)
description: Control-plane declaration emitted by LeafcutterAnt when (and only when) routing authorizes LEAFCUTTERANT_STAGING. Binds staging/chunking decision inputs to a hash-bound declaration. Does not seal evidence identity.

generated_utc.description: UTC timestamp (RFC3339) when this declaration was produced.

route_binding.description: Binds this declaration to the routing authorization artifact.

route_selected.description: LeafcutterAnt declarations exist only when routing explicitly selected staging.

admission_route_sha512.description: SHA-512 of canonicalized admission_route.json payload (or the value recorded in admission_route integrity).

reason_codes.description: Reason codes copied from admission_route.json (explainability only; enforcement remains in routing artifact).

channel_limits_snapshot.description: Optional informational snapshot copied from admission_route.json.channel_limits.

evidence_set.description: Declared evidence items being admitted (logical names only; no paths).

filename.description: Logical filename of the evidence object being admitted.

byte_size.description: Measured size in bytes at LeafcutterAnt admission time.

row_count.description: Optional row count if deterministically measurable. Omit if unavailable.

chunking_required.description: Per-item decision: whether this item requires chunking under threshold_used.

threshold_used.description: Identifier of the threshold rule used to decide chunking (must exist in thresholds.json).

chunking_required_any.description: Evidence-set summary: true if any evidence item requires chunking.

chunking_required_all.description: Evidence-set summary: true if all evidence items require chunking.

chunking.description: Chunking configuration. REQUIRED iff chunking_required_any is true.

engine_ref.description: Reference identifier for the chunking executor (e.g., 'FastCDC').

profile_ref.description: Reference identifier for the engine profile (e.g., 'FastCDC/1' or a profile filename).

target_chunk_bytes.description: Target chunk size in bytes (e.g., 67108864 for 64MB).

evidence_type.description: Optional non-authoritative classification of what is being admitted.

inputs.description: Provenance bindings to the exact config inputs used for this decision.

thresholds_sha512.description: SHA-512 of thresholds.json used for decision.

active_channel_limits_sha512.description: SHA-512 of active_channel_limits.json used for decision.

admission_route_sha512.description: SHA-512 of canonicalized admission_route.json payload (duplicated here for direct provenance checking).

optional.description: Optional non-authoritative pointers (e.g., chunk manifest reference name/id).

declared_by.description: Operator identifier (human or system) that produced the declaration.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes. Must not contain derived findings or content excerpts.

declaration_sha512.description: SHA-512 of the canonicalized admission_declaration.json payload.

canonicalization_method_id.description: Identifier describing how the declaration payload was canonicalized prior to hashing.

allOf.description: LeafcutterAnt declarations are only valid for staging runs.
